name: @granoflow/mcp-server
description: Connect MCP-capable AI agents to Granoflow workflows for local tasks, requirement capture, approval requests, due-task processing, reviews, first-run import, review cards, and work memory.

scripts.build: npm run clean && tsc -p tsconfig.json && chmod +x dist/index.js dist/gfmcp-runner-launcher.js dist/persistent-milestone-runner-launcher.js
scripts.check:python: ruff check skills/granoflow-gfmcp-runner/scripts skills/granoflow-delegated-authorization/scripts skills/granoflow-task-orchestrator/scripts skills/granoflow-persistent-milestone-runner/scripts skills/granoflow-project-definition/scripts skills/granoflow-integration-test-campaign/scripts skills/granoflow-e2e-test-campaign/scripts skills/granoflow-agent-workflow/scripts/render_project_lifecycle_board.py skills/granoflow-agent-workflow/scripts/lint_integration_test_special_requirements.py skills/granoflow-agent-workflow/scripts/lint_app_icon_source_gate.py skills/granoflow-agent-workflow/scripts/lint_prototype_implementation_fidelity.py skills/granoflow-agent-workflow/scripts/lint_prototype_doc_coverage.py skills/granoflow-agent-workflow/scripts/lint_code_signing_strategy.py skills/granoflow-agent-workflow/scripts/lint_third_party_capability_matrix.py skills/granoflow-agent-workflow/scripts/render_markdown_acceptance_html.py skills/granoflow-agent-workflow/scripts/lint_implementation_design_fidelity.py tests/python && ruff format --check skills/granoflow-gfmcp-runner/scripts skills/granoflow-delegated-authorization/scripts skills/granoflow-task-orchestrator/scripts skills/granoflow-persistent-milestone-runner/scripts skills/granoflow-project-definition/scripts skills/granoflow-integration-test-campaign/scripts skills/granoflow-e2e-test-campaign/scripts skills/granoflow-agent-workflow/scripts/render_project_lifecycle_board.py skills/granoflow-agent-workflow/scripts/lint_integration_test_special_requirements.py skills/granoflow-agent-workflow/scripts/lint_app_icon_source_gate.py skills/granoflow-agent-workflow/scripts/lint_prototype_implementation_fidelity.py skills/granoflow-agent-workflow/scripts/lint_prototype_doc_coverage.py skills/granoflow-agent-workflow/scripts/lint_code_signing_strategy.py skills/granoflow-agent-workflow/scripts/lint_third_party_capability_matrix.py skills/granoflow-agent-workflow/scripts/render_markdown_acceptance_html.py skills/granoflow-agent-workflow/scripts/lint_implementation_design_fidelity.py tests/python && pyright skills/granoflow-gfmcp-runner/scripts skills/granoflow-delegated-authorization/scripts skills/granoflow-task-orchestrator/scripts skills/granoflow-persistent-milestone-runner/scripts skills/granoflow-project-definition/scripts skills/granoflow-integration-test-campaign/scripts skills/granoflow-e2e-test-campaign/scripts skills/granoflow-agent-workflow/scripts/render_project_lifecycle_board.py skills/granoflow-agent-workflow/scripts/lint_integration_test_special_requirements.py skills/granoflow-agent-workflow/scripts/lint_app_icon_source_gate.py skills/granoflow-agent-workflow/scripts/lint_prototype_implementation_fidelity.py skills/granoflow-agent-workflow/scripts/lint_prototype_doc_coverage.py skills/granoflow-agent-workflow/scripts/lint_code_signing_strategy.py skills/granoflow-agent-workflow/scripts/lint_third_party_capability_matrix.py skills/granoflow-agent-workflow/scripts/render_markdown_acceptance_html.py skills/granoflow-agent-workflow/scripts/lint_implementation_design_fidelity.py tests/python && npm run test:python
scripts.check: npm run format && npm run lint && npm run check:python && npm run build && npm run test
